mapper.select: select id, owner_id, owner_name, visitor_name, visitor_phone, visit_time, leave_time, status, community_id, building, unit, room, create_time, update_time, remark from community_visitor where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into community_visitor ( owner_id, owner_name, visitor_name, visitor_phone, visitor_id_card, visit_reason, expected_visit_time, actual_visit_time, leave_time, status, invite_code, community_id, building, unit, room, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{ownerId}, #{ownerName}, #{visitorName}, #{visitorPhone}, #{visitorIdCard}, #{visitReason}, #{expectedVisitTime}, #{actualVisitTime}, #{leaveTime}, #{status}, #{inviteCode}, #{communityId}, #{building}, #{unit}, #{room}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: update community_visitor set owner_id = #{ownerId}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, visitor_name = #{visitorName}, visitor_phone = #{visitorPhone}, visitor_id_card = #{visitorIdCard}, visit_reason = #{visitReason}, expected_visit_time = #{expectedVisitTime}, actual_visit_time = #{actualVisitTime}, leave_time = #{leaveTime}, status = #{status}, invite_code = #{inviteCode}, community_id = #{communityId}, building = #{building}, unit = #{unit}, room = #{room}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_visitor WHERE id IN (${ids})
